inline_comments.message: Do we really need all of those numerous deps? In offline-installer repo while fixing the same issue I just set up what is in requirements-docs.txt and git.onap.org/doc/plain/etc/upper-constraints.os.txt and it's working fine. So much deps makes the verify process much longer.

It guarantees that your vitual env in gates (and in your laptop) is always equal and well pinned. Onap asks for a few sphinx libs which are'nt tracked by OS and then a second file is needed.

I don't see your point as constraints doesn't add any package (see requirements-docs.txt)
